label: P&L Attribution
description: Breakdown of P&L by factor: funding, carry, basis, delta, and residual with drill-down per strategy.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary: PASS (global in widget-wrapper.tsx). 0.2 requiredEntitlements: PASS ([execution-basic, execution-full]). 0.3 availableOn: PASS ([overview]). 0.4 No any/@ts-ignore: PASS. 0.5 No lib/mocks/ imports: PASS. 0.6 Loading state: FIXED — added coreLoading Spinner guard. 0.7 Empty state: FIXED — added 'No P&L attribution data' when pnlComponents.length===0. 0.8 Error state: PASS (global WidgetErrorBoundary). 0.9 Dead code: PASS (none found).

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via hook: PASS — reads pnlComponents/totalPnl/coreLoading exclusively via useOverviewDataSafe(). 1.2 Context reads useGlobalScope: PASS — use-overview-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() twice (wsScope + context). 1.3 Org filter: PASS — pnlComponents derive from aggregatedPnL which is computed from getAggregatedPnlForScope(organizationIds, clientIds, strategyIds) in mock mode. 1.4 Client filter: PASS — getAggregatedPnlForScope takes clientIds; narrows scope. 1.5 Strategy filter: PASS — getAggregatedPnlForScope takes strategyIds. 1.6 Empty scope = all data: PASS — empty arrays passed to getAggregatedPnlForScope return unfiltered full dataset. 1.7 Reference data location: PASS — getAggregatedPnlForScope is in lib/mocks/fixtures/mock-data-index (mock data path is acceptable; no fixture constants embedded in widget).

findings: L0.6 was failing: no loading guard. Fixed by adding coreLoading Spinner.
L0.7 was failing: no empty state. Fixed by adding 'No P&L attribution data' guard on pnlComponents.length===0.
